display.purpose: Catalog hero and large recipe titles (Newsreader).

body.purpose: Ingredients, steps, UI copy (Plus Jakarta Sans).

motion.name: ease-card
motion.purpose: Default 200ms transitions on catalog cards (with motion-reduce fallback).

components.name: Top nav (target tokens)
components.description: Frosted bar: prefer surface/atelier text and primary active state; replace stone/emerald.
components.html:
Culinary Atelier
RecipesPlan
components.css: .ds-topnav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 5rem; padding: 0 2rem; background: rgba(251, 249, 248, 0.88); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(15, 82, 56, 0.06); } .ds-topnav-brand { font-family: Newsreader, Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; font-style: italic; color: #123628; text-decoration: none; } .ds-topnav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; } .ds-topnav-link { font-family: "Plus Jakarta Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; color: #404943; text-decoration: none; padding-bottom: 0.25rem; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; transition: color 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-topnav-link:hover { color: #0f5238; } .ds-topnav-link.is-active { color: #0f5238; font-weight: 700; border-bottom-color: #0f5238; } .ds-topnav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0f5238; outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Primary CTA
components.description: Add Recipe / solid actions on recipe flows.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; min-height: 3.5rem; padding: 0 1.5rem; border: none; border-radius: 1rem; font-family: "Plus Jakarta Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; background: #0f5238; box-shadow: 0 14px 30px rgba(15, 82, 56, 0.22); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #174d38; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0f5238; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-primary-icon { display: flex; line-height: 0; }

components.name: Recipe catalog card frame
components.description: Parchment tile with primary ring and atelier grid shadow.
components.html:
Roasted vegetable bowl

A weeknight favorite with tahini.
components.css: .ds-recipe-card { display: block; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 1.75rem; background: #fffaf0; box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(15, 82, 56, 0.06); outline: 1px solid rgba(15, 82, 56, 0.1); outline-offset: -1px; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-recipe-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(15, 82, 56, 0.09); } .ds-recipe-card-media { aspect-ratio: 4/3; background: #e6d6bd; } .ds-recipe-card-body { padding: 1.25rem; } .ds-recipe-card-title { font-family: Newsreader, Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: #123628; margin: 0; } .ds-recipe-card-desc { font-family: "Plus Jakarta Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #5d6c60; margin: 0.5rem 0 0; }

narrative.overview: The interface reads like a high-end food magazine: generous space, serif-led hierarchy, and parchment-like surfaces so recipes stay the hero. The product rejects sterile dashboards and coupon-driven meal-kit chrome; depth comes from paper-like tones and soft shadows, not from stacking boxes. The codebase uses Material-aligned roles and Atelier semantic roles (CSS variables) together; recipe pages should replace hex literals with atelier Tailwind classes during the color pass. TopNavBar currently uses stone/emerald and should converge on the shared token set.
keyCharacteristics: Serif display (Newsreader) for page titles and recipe names; Plus Jakarta Sans for UI labels and dense text.
Warm canvas (atelier-canvas) under catalog flows; global surface for system-wide baseline.
Large corner radius (28px) on catalog shells and cards.

rules.name: The Ring-Instead-Of Rule (for catalog)
rules.body: Section separation on recipe list uses ring-1 ring-primary/8–15 on parchment panels and cards, not harsh dividers.

rules.name: The Dual-Surface Rule
rules.body: Global body uses surface; recipe flows often sit on atelier-canvas. Both are valid; do not collapse without an explicit decision.

rules.name: The Left-Align Body Rule
rules.body: Do not center-align body paragraphs except in dedicated empty-state blocks.

rules.name: The No-Layout-Animation Rule
rules.body: Prefer transitioning transform and box-shadow on cards, not width/height/margin animations.

dos: Do use atelier/* or Material semantic colors from tailwind.config.ts instead of re-typing hex on stabilized surfaces.
Do keep touch targets at least 44px height on primary actions.
Do use Newsreader for recipe titles and step indices where the catalog already does.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion on hover transitions.
donts: Don't build new recipe UI on stone / emerald Tailwind defaults; align TopNavBar with the shared token set.
Don't let the product feel like industrial ERP systems.
Don't mimic generic meal-kit subscription apps.
Don't use pure #000 / #fff for large text or page backgrounds.
Don't use gradient text for core content.
